docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY THOMPSON, LENETTE AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, JOAQUIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED JUL-31-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, JOAQUIN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF LENETTE THOMPSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOAQUIN GOMEZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE MATTER HAS SETTLED AND IS REQUESTING A DISMISSAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-20-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LENETTE THOMPSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOAQUIN GOMEZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES STATED THEY HAVE A SETTLEMENT AND ARE REQUESTING A PROGRESS REPORT DATE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT CALLING, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
